name: traces
invariants: output.ok === false || (typeof output.result.p50 === 'number' && typeof output.result.p95 === 'number' && typeof output.result.p99 === 'number')
_note: Reads the request-trace ring buffer (per-user STATE traces + the global HTTP span buffer) and rolls up p50/p95/p99 latency + per-route stats. The assassin's owner actor starts with no traces → ok:true with empty spans[] and zero percentiles (NEVER no_db). A poisoned numeric limit fails CLOSED with invalid_limit.
